chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يُتَغَوَّطَ فِيهِ أَوْ يُبَالَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 11 – The place in which it is abhorred to defacte or urinate in

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/53)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/53)
text: نَهَى النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَنْ يُطَمِّحَ الرَّجُلُ بِبَوْلِهِ مِنَ السَّطْحِ أَوْ مِنَ الشَّيْ‏ءِ الْمُرْتَفِعِ فِي الْهَوَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Prophet<sup>saww</sup> forbade the man to urinate from the roof, or something from the high places, in the air’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Holy prophet prohibited one’s allowing his urine to sprinkle from rooftops or high places in the air.”
